description: Book writing workflow routing for CortexOS/OpenClaw agents.

chapter:edit.description: Edit structure, voice, clarity, and continuity

chapter:review.description: Review chapter against brief, claims, continuity, and reader value

chapter:evaluate.description: Score chapter against quality rubric and decide pass/block

chapter:translate.description: Translate approved chapter into target locale

chapter:done.description: PM closes chapter after final acceptance
